settings.text: DriftPad for Hot Wheels • Drift Pad for 1:64 Scale

settings.heading: DriftPad for Hot Wheels
settings.subheading: Premium motorised drifting display for 1:64 diecast collectors
settings.trust_text: Works with all 1:64 diecast cars (Hot Wheel Edition starts shipping from (5/6/2026)

settings.text: Convenience-store yellow, parking-lot diorama, 360° drift. The first DriftPad — and still the one that lands on most desks.

settings.heading: Tap a number. See what's on the desk.
06 / WHAT COLLECTORS SAY
settings.testimonial_1_quote: Drops into my battlestation like it was made for it.
settings.testimonial_2_quote: I've got 300+ cars on glass. This is the one everyone reaches for first.
settings.testimonial_3_quote: Hits the same spot Initial D did when I was 15.
settings.testimonial_4_quote: Smooth, premium, and looks better in person than the photos.
settings.testimonial_5_quote: The finish feels solid and the details make the whole setup feel real.
settings.testimonial_6_quote: Exactly what my shelf was missing. Clean design and really fun to display.
settings.testimonial_7_quote: My son and I both use it. It instantly makes the cars feel more alive.
settings.testimonial_8_quote: Packaging was clean and the product looked premium right out of the box.
settings.testimonial_9_quote: I bought one and came back for another. It photographs so well.
settings.testimonial_10_quote: The details are sharp, the size is right, and it feels made for collectors.

settings.text: "I built the first DriftPad on my kitchen table. It was for one car I'd kept since I was a kid. Then friends asked for one. Then their friends. Now we make them properly."
